name: @ordering-system/shared-layer
description: Shared Lambda layer: Powertools, validation, errors, DynamoDB client

scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run build && mkdir -p layer/nodejs && cp -r dist layer/nodejs/ && cp package.json layer/nodejs/ && cd layer/nodejs && npm install --omit=dev && cd ../.. && cd layer && zip -r ../shared-layer.zip nodejs
